description: Launch Safari and open browser features.
author: colorfulDots

commands.name: Safari New Window
commands.target: tell application "Safari" to make new document

commands.name: Safari Private Window
commands.target:
tell application "Safari" to activate
tell application "System Events" to keystroke "n" using {command down, shift down}
commands.description: Open a new private browsing window in Safari

commands.name: Safari Reading List
commands.target:
tell application "Safari" to activate
tell application "System Events" to keystroke "l" using {command down, shift down}
